name: Red Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet and sauté the chopped onion until tender.
2. Remove from heat and add the flour. Mix into a paste by gradually adding chili powder, Tabasco sauce, salt, garlic, and cumin.
3. Gradually add water while stirring constantly. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. This recipe makes enough red sauce for 1 standard size Beef Enchiladas recipe.
